name: adult small & mini chicken & brown rice recipe dog food
description: big on love, small in size. hill's science diet small & mini adult dry dog food is tailored nutrition for the unique needs of small & mini dogs during the prime of their life. specially made with a delightful kibble texture designed for your small dog's unique preferences balanced nutrition to help keep your dog at their ideal weight easy-to-digest ingredients, including pumpkin, to help support healthy digestion and stool quality the right combination of protein, fats, and carbs to give them the energy they need contains our special small & mini antioxidant blend for lifelong immune support
